# Paylix SDK — Complete Reference
# Version: 0.1.0
# Last updated: 2026-04-09
#
# Paylix is an open-source, self-hostable crypto payment platform.
# Accept USDC payments and subscriptions on Base with TypeScript.
# Funds go directly to your wallet — no custodial intermediary.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @paylix/sdk
# or
pnpm add @paylix/sdk
# or
yarn add @paylix/sdk
```

## Initialization

```typescript
import { Paylix, webhooks, NETWORKS } from "@paylix/sdk";

const paylix = new Paylix({
  apiKey: "sk_live_...",           // Secret API key from dashboard
  network: "base",                 // "base" (mainnet) or "base-sepolia" (testnet)
  merchantWallet: "0x1234...abcd", // Your wallet that receives payments
  backendUrl: "https://paylix.example.com", // Your Paylix backend URL
});
```

## SDK Methods

### paylix.createCheckout(params)

Creates a one-time payment checkout session.

```typescript
const { checkoutUrl, checkoutId } = await paylix.createCheckout({
  productId: "prod_abc123",              // required — product ID from dashboard
  customerId: "cust_xyz",                // optional — your customer identifier
  successUrl: "https://example.com/ok",  // optional — redirect after payment
  cancelUrl: "https://example.com/cancel", // optional — redirect on cancel
  metadata: { orderId: "42" },           // optional — arbitrary key-value pairs
});
// Returns: { checkoutUrl: string; checkoutId: string }
// Redirect user to checkoutUrl to complete payment.
```

### paylix.createSubscription(params)

Creates a recurring subscription checkout session.

```typescript
const { checkoutUrl, subscriptionId } = await paylix.createSubscription({
  productId: "prod_monthly_pro",         // required — subscription product ID
  customerId: "cust_xyz",                // optional
  successUrl: "https://example.com/welcome", // optional
  cancelUrl: "https://example.com/pricing",  // optional
  metadata: { plan: "pro" },             // optional
});
// Returns: { checkoutUrl: string; subscriptionId: string }
```

### paylix.cancelSubscription(params)

Marks a subscription as cancelled in the Paylix database.

```typescript
await paylix.cancelSubscription({
  subscriptionId: "sub_abc123", // required
});
// Returns: void
```

IMPORTANT: This SDK method only updates the database. It does NOT cancel
the on-chain subscription. To actually stop future charges, the merchant
wallet or the subscriber wallet must sign an on-chain cancel transaction
via the merchant dashboard or the customer portal. See the "Subscription
Cancellation" section below for the full two-layer model.

### paylix.updateSubscriptionWallet(params)

Prompts the subscriber to update the wallet used for recurring charges.

```typescript
await paylix.updateSubscriptionWallet({
  subscriptionId: "sub_abc123", // required
});
// Returns: void
```

### paylix.verifyPayment(params)

Verifies a payment's on-chain status. Always verify server-side before fulfilling.

```typescript
const result = await paylix.verifyPayment({
  paymentId: "pay_abc123", // required
});
// Returns:
// {
//   verified: boolean;    — true if confirmed on-chain
//   amount: number;       — amount in USDC cents (1000 = $10.00)
//   fee: number;          — platform fee in USDC cents
//   txHash: string;       — on-chain transaction hash
//   chain: string;        — "base" or "base-sepolia"
//   customerId: string;
//   productId: string;
//   status: "confirmed" | "pending" | "failed";
// }
```

### paylix.getCustomerPortal(params)

Returns a customer's payment history and subscriptions.

```typescript
const portal = await paylix.getCustomerPortal({
  customerId: "cust_xyz", // required
});
// Returns:
// {
//   customer: Customer;
//   payments: Payment[];
//   subscriptions: Subscription[];
// }
```

### webhooks.verify(params)

Verifies a webhook signature. Returns true if the signature is valid.

```typescript
import { webhooks } from "@paylix/sdk";

const isValid = webhooks.verify({
  payload: rawBody,                              // required — raw request body as string
  signature: req.headers["x-paylix-signature"],  // required — signature header
  secret: "whsec_...",                           // required — webhook secret from dashboard
});
// Returns: boolean
```

## Webhook Events

All webhooks are POST requests with JSON body and an `x-paylix-signature` header.

### payment.confirmed

Sent when a one-time payment is confirmed on-chain.

```json
{
  "type": "payment.confirmed",
  "data": {
    "paymentId": "pay_abc123",
    "checkoutId": "chk_xyz789",
    "productId": "prod_abc123",
    "customerId": "cust_xyz",
    "amount": 1000,
    "fee": 30,
    "currency": "USDC",
    "chain": "base",
    "txHash": "0xabc...def",
    "merchantWallet": "0x1234...abcd",
    "metadata": { "orderId": "42" },
    "confirmedAt": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### subscription.created

Sent when a subscription is created and first payment confirmed.

```json
{
  "type": "subscription.created",
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "sub_abc123",
    "productId": "prod_monthly_pro",
    "customerId": "cust_xyz",
    "amount": 2000,
    "currency": "USDC",
    "chain": "base",
    "interval": "monthly",
    "subscriberWallet": "0xabcd...1234",
    "merchantWallet": "0x1234...abcd",
    "metadata": {},
    "createdAt": "2026-01-15T10:30:00Z",
    "nextChargeAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### subscription.charged

Sent when a recurring charge is processed.

```json
{
  "type": "subscription.charged",
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "sub_abc123",
    "paymentId": "pay_def456",
    "productId": "prod_monthly_pro",
    "customerId": "cust_xyz",
    "amount": 2000,
    "fee": 60,
    "currency": "USDC",
    "chain": "base",
    "txHash": "0xdef...789",
    "chargedAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z",
    "nextChargeAt": "2026-03-15T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### subscription.past_due

Sent when a recurring charge fails.

```json
{
  "type": "subscription.past_due",
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "sub_abc123",
    "productId": "prod_monthly_pro",
    "customerId": "cust_xyz",
    "reason": "insufficient_balance",
    "failedAt": "2026-02-15T10:30:00Z",
    "retryAt": "2026-02-16T10:30:00Z"
  }
}
```

### subscription.cancelled

Sent when a subscription is cancelled.

```json
{
  "type": "subscription.cancelled",
  "data": {
    "subscriptionId": "sub_abc123",
    "productId": "prod_monthly_pro",
    "customerId": "cust_xyz",
    "cancelledBy": "merchant",
    "cancelledAt": "2026-03-01T12:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

## Subscription Cancellation

Paylix subscriptions are a two-layer system:

1. A row in the Paylix database (status, next charge date, metadata).
2. An on-chain record inside the SubscriptionManager smart contract on Base
   that authorizes the keeper to pull USDC from the subscriber's wallet on
   a schedule.

Both layers must be cancelled. Updating only the database does NOT stop
charges — the keeper will keep calling the contract until the on-chain
record is terminated.

### Who can cancel on-chain

The SubscriptionManager contract enforces a strict access check on
`cancelSubscription(subscriptionId)`. Only two addresses are allowed to
call it for any given subscription:

- The subscriber's wallet (the address that signed the original approval).
- The merchant wallet (the wallet configured to receive charges).

Neither the Paylix backend nor an API key can cancel on-chain on a user's
behalf. The subscriber's funds are protected by the same self-custody
model as any other EOA.

### Cancellation flow

1. User clicks Cancel in the merchant dashboard or the customer portal.
2. A modal prompts them to connect the merchant or subscriber wallet.
3. They sign a `cancelSubscription(onChainId)` transaction on Base.
4. The contract emits a `SubscriptionCancelled` event.
5. The Paylix indexer picks up the event and updates the DB row to
   status `cancelled`.
6. The keeper skips the subscription on its next tick.
7. A `subscription.cancelled` webhook is delivered.

### Two cancellation paths in the product

- Merchant dashboard → Subscribers → Cancel. Requires the merchant wallet
  to be connected. Signs on-chain as the merchant.
- Customer portal → Cancel on an active subscription. Requires the
  subscriber to connect their own wallet and sign on-chain as themselves.

### Billing intervals

Subscription products support these intervals:
`minutely` (testing only), `weekly`, `biweekly`, `monthly`, `quarterly`,
`yearly`.

### Past due

If a recurring charge reverts (insufficient USDC balance or the subscriber
revoked the approval), the subscription becomes `past_due` and a
`subscription.past_due` webhook fires. The keeper retries on the next
tick. A past-due subscription still has an active on-chain record, so to
fully end it someone must still sign an on-chain cancel.

## Webhook Handler Examples

### Next.js App Router

```typescript
// app/api/webhooks/paylix/route.ts
import { webhooks } from "@paylix/sdk";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const payload = await req.text();
  const signature = req.headers.get("x-paylix-signature")!;

  const isValid = webhooks.verify({
    payload,
    signature,
    secret: process.env.PAYLIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET!,
  });

  if (!isValid) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid signature" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const event = JSON.parse(payload);

  switch (event.type) {
    case "payment.confirmed":
      await fulfillOrder(event.data.productId, event.data.customerId);
      break;
    case "subscription.created":
      await activateSubscription(event.data.subscriptionId);
      break;
    case "subscription.charged":
      await recordCharge(event.data.subscriptionId, event.data.amount);
      break;
    case "subscription.past_due":
      await handlePastDue(event.data.subscriptionId);
      break;
    case "subscription.cancelled":
      await revokeAccess(event.data.subscriptionId);
      break;
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}
```

### Express

```typescript
import express from "express";
import { webhooks } from "@paylix/sdk";

const app = express();

app.post(
  "/api/webhooks/paylix",
  express.raw({ type: "application/json" }),
  (req, res) => {
    const payload = req.body.toString();
    const signature = req.headers["x-paylix-signature"] as string;

    const isValid = webhooks.verify({
      payload,
      signature,
      secret: process.env.PAYLIX_WEBHOOK_SECRET!,
    });

    if (!isValid) {
      return res.status(401).json({ error: "Invalid signature" });
    }

    const event = JSON.parse(payload);
    // Handle event...
    res.json({ received: true });
  }
);
```

## Common Patterns

### Create Checkout and Redirect (Next.js Server Action)

```typescript
"use server";
import { Paylix } from "@paylix/sdk";
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";

const paylix = new Paylix({
  apiKey: process.env.PAYLIX_SECRET_KEY!,
  network: "base",
  merchantWallet: process.env.MERCHANT_WALLET!,
  backendUrl: process.env.PAYLIX_BACKEND_URL!,
});

export async function buyProduct(productId: string, customerId: string) {
  const { checkoutUrl } = await paylix.createCheckout({
    productId,
    customerId,
    successUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/success`,
    cancelUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/pricing`,
  });
  redirect(checkoutUrl);
}
```

### Create Subscription

```typescript
export async function subscribe(productId: string, customerId: string) {
  const { checkoutUrl, subscriptionId } = await paylix.createSubscription({
    productId,
    customerId,
    successUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/welcome`,
    cancelUrl: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/pricing`,
  });
  // Store subscriptionId in your database
  await db.update(users).set({ subscriptionId }).where(eq(users.id, customerId));
  redirect(checkoutUrl);
}
```

### Verify Payment Server-Side

```typescript
// app/api/verify/route.ts
import { Paylix } from "@paylix/sdk";
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";

const paylix = new Paylix({ /* config */ });

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const paymentId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get("paymentId");
  if (!paymentId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing paymentId" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const result = await paylix.verifyPayment({ paymentId });

  if (result.verified) {
    // Mark order as fulfilled in your database
    return NextResponse.json({ status: "confirmed", txHash: result.txHash });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ status: result.status });
}
```

### Gate Content Behind Payment

```typescript
// middleware.ts or server component
import { Paylix } from "@paylix/sdk";

const paylix = new Paylix({ /* config */ });

export async function hasActiveSubscription(customerId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const portal = await paylix.getCustomerPortal({ customerId });
  return portal.subscriptions.some((sub) => sub.status === "active");
}

// In your page:
export default async function PremiumPage() {
  const user = await getCurrentUser();
  const hasAccess = await hasActiveSubscription(user.id);

  if (!hasAccess) {
    redirect("/pricing");
  }

  return <div>Premium content here</div>;
}
```

## Network Configurations

```typescript
import { NETWORKS } from "@paylix/sdk";

// Base Mainnet
NETWORKS["base"] = {
  chainId: 8453,
  name: "Base",
  rpcUrl: "https://mainnet.base.org",
  usdcAddress: "0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913",
  explorerUrl: "https://basescan.org",
};

// Base Sepolia (Testnet)
NETWORKS["base-sepolia"] = {
  chainId: 84532,
  name: "Base Sepolia",
  rpcUrl: "https://sepolia.base.org",
  usdcAddress: "0x...",  // MockUSDC contract
  explorerUrl: "https://sepolia.basescan.org",
};
```

## TypeScript Types

```typescript
// Configuration
interface PaylixConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  network: "base" | "base-sepolia";
  merchantWallet: string;
  backendUrl: string;
}

// Checkout
interface CreateCheckoutParams {
  productId: string;
  customerId?: string;
  successUrl?: string;
  cancelUrl?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
}

interface CreateCheckoutResult {
  checkoutUrl: string;
  checkoutId: string;
}

// Subscription
interface CreateSubscriptionParams {
  productId: string;
  customerId?: string;
  successUrl?: string;
  cancelUrl?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, string>;
}

interface CreateSubscriptionResult {
  checkoutUrl: string;
  subscriptionId: string;
}

// Payment Verification
interface VerifyPaymentParams {
  paymentId: string;
}

interface VerifyPaymentResult {
  verified: boolean;
  amount: number;       // USDC cents (1000 = $10.00)
  fee: number;          // USDC cents
  txHash: string;
  chain: string;
  customerId: string;
  productId: string;
  status: "confirmed" | "pending" | "failed";
}

// Customer Portal
interface CustomerPortalParams {
  customerId: string;
}

interface CustomerPortal {
  customer: Customer;
  payments: Payment[];
  subscriptions: Subscription[];
}

// Webhook Verification
interface WebhookVerifyParams {
  payload: string;
  signature: string;
  secret: string;
}

// Network
interface NetworkConfig {
  chainId: number;
  name: string;
  rpcUrl: string;
  usdcAddress: string;
  explorerUrl: string;
}

// Webhook Event
type WebhookEventType =
  | "payment.confirmed"
  | "subscription.created"
  | "subscription.charged"
  | "subscription.past_due"
  | "subscription.cancelled";

interface WebhookEvent {
  type: WebhookEventType;
  data: Record<string, unknown>;
}
```

## Key Concepts

- **Amounts**: All amounts are in USDC cents (integer). 1000 = $10.00 USDC.
- **API Keys**: `pk_` prefix for publishable (client-side), `sk_` prefix for secret (server-side).
- **Networks**: `"base"` for mainnet, `"base-sepolia"` for testnet.
- **Non-custodial**: Payments go directly to your `merchantWallet`. Paylix never holds funds.
- **Webhook secrets**: `whsec_` prefix. Always verify signatures server-side.
- **Subscriptions**: Use ERC-20 `approve` + on-chain keeper pattern. No off-chain card storage.
